tasks.label: frontend-clean-and-install-safe
tasks.command: Set-Location developer-workflow-ui; npm.cmd run clean:deps; npm.cmd run install:safe

tasks.label: npm-registry-direct-check
tasks.command: Set-Location developer-workflow-ui; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest 'https://registry.npmjs.org/@angular%2fanimations' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "direct-status=$($r.StatusCode)" } catch { Write-Output "direct-error=$($_.Exception.Message)" }; npm.cmd ping --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/; npm.cmd view @angular/animations version --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/

tasks.label: node-https-registry-check
tasks.command: Set-Location developer-workflow-ui; node -e "require('https').get('https://registry.npmjs.org/@angular%2fanimations', r => { console.log('node-status=' + r.statusCode); r.resume(); }).on('error', e => { console.error('node-error=' + e.code + ':' + e.message); process.exit(1); })"

tasks.label: node-https-registry-check-cmd
tasks.command: Set-Location developer-workflow-ui; cmd.exe /c "node -e \"require('https').get('https://registry.npmjs.org/@angular%2fanimations', r => { console.log('node-status=' + r.statusCode); r.resume(); }).on('error', e => { console.error('node-error=' + e.code + ':' + e.message); process.exit(1); })\""

tasks.label: node-https-ipv4-registry-check
tasks.command: Set-Location developer-workflow-ui; cmd.exe /c "node -e \"const https=require('https'); const agent=new https.Agent({family:4}); https.get('https://registry.npmjs.org/@angular%2fanimations', {agent}, r => { console.log('node-ipv4-status=' + r.statusCode); r.resume(); }).on('error', e => { console.error('node-ipv4-error=' + e.code + ':' + e.message); process.exit(1); })\""
